patch.value: Add Claude Code rows to docs read-path and README start-here tables

docs/README read-path has a Codex row but no Claude Code row despite CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md being the most feature-rich plugin; README start-here lacks a Claude Code plugin row; asymmetry hurts discoverability.
Add Claude Code rows pointing to CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md in both tables; docs-skills gate passes.
